32: Vertex Extensions: A Vertex AI extension is a structured API wrapper that enables a
33: model to connect with external APIs for real-time data processing and action
34: execution. Extensions offer enterprise-grade security, data privacy, and performance
35: guarantees. They can be used for tasks like generating and running code, querying
36: websites, and analyzing information from private datastores. Google provides prebuilt
37: extensions for common use cases like Code Interpreter and Vertex AI Search, with the
